privileged_info_summary: Task corporate_customer_onboarding@1 involves importing 30 existing retail customers from a CSV file into a Copper Point of Sale system, then adding 6 new B2B corporate clients with tiered pricing: Pacific Northwest Distributors and Southern Fashion Group (GOLD tier, $25,000 and $30,000 credit limits), Midwest Retail Holdings and Atlantic Coast Trading (SILVER tier, $15,000 and $12,000 credit limits), and Great Lakes Supply Co. and Mountain West Goods (BRONZE tier, $5,000 and $7,500 credit limits). Three existing customers must be updated with preferred account status: Sheryl Baxter and Preston Lozano marked as preferred, Roy Berry marked as non-preferred with past due balance. The final step is exporting the complete customer list (36 total) to a CSV file. All metadata claims have been verified against the actual data files.
